design_philosophy: A sophisticated B2B deep-tech venture aesthetic. Interleaves warm, editorial, human-centric sections (Anthropic/Notion) with cold, precise, data-dense technical sections (Palantir/Vercel/Stripe). The synthesis builds high institutional trust while showcasing cutting-edge AI infrastructure.

rules: Use Fraunces (light/regular/medium) for massive section headers. It brings editorial gravitas.
Use Manrope for all body copy for clean, humanist readability.
Use JetBrains Mono exclusively for uppercase overlines, data tags, and technical UI elements (e.g., '01 / THE PROBLEM', 'STATUS: ACTIVE').
Never center-align large paragraphs. Always left-align for editorial feel.
Track out (letter-spacing) monospaced overlines tightly with tracking-widest.

color_palette.guidance: The app should primarily run in the light theme (Anthropic/Notion warm cream #FAFAF7) for human narrative, but switch to a strict '.dark-section' (Palantir/Vercel #050505) for the Hero and AXXESS Platform technical displays. The light accent is a terracotta/ochre, while the dark accent is a sharp stripe/palantir blue.

hero.layout: Grid-based, asymmetric. Large Fraunces heading with high contrast. Use abstract 3D dark network background.
hero.features: Monospace system status tags, highly technical.

problem.layout: Editorial 2-column. Massive '01 / THE PROBLEM' mono overline, huge serif heading.
problem.features: Generous whitespace, warm cream background, human-centric copy.

five_axis_framework.layout: Animated diagrammatic bento-grid. 5 specific axes detailed with precision.
five_axis_framework.features: Stripe-quality hover reveals and polished micro-interactions. Layered cards with subtle shadows.

axxess_platform.layout: Dense data-confidence UI. Six layers (CICE, SSIA, CHLIS, AGLAE, SIMA, CCAF) presented like an operating system interface.
axxess_platform.features: JetBrains Mono labels, hairline 1px borders, subtle blue glowing accents.

solution_and_revenue.layout: Structured grids, bold typography for large solution numbers (80% / 20% / 100%), clean minimal cards for Triple-Funnel revenue.
solution_and_revenue.features: Focus on content and crisp layout with 1px hairline dividers.

market_and_traction.layout: Minimalist numbers, large serif typography, clean timeline or phased expansion grid.

team.layout: 3-column grid for Sudipta Koushik Sarmah, Ritashree Mahanta, Ananya Singhal. Clean portraits, minimal text.
team.features: Anthropic-style precise layouts, no heavy shadows.

motion_interactions.philosophy: Stripe-quality. Deliberate, technical, smooth. NO bouncing or playful jiggles.

testing.data_testid_convention: All interactive elements (buttons, links, form inputs) and key informational nodes (section wrappers, cards) must have a kebab-case data-testid attribute based on role. e.g., 'hero-cta-button', 'axxess-layer-card'.

image_urls.description: 3D abstract geometric structure with gold lines and black polygons on a dark background. (Palantir vibe)
Abstract blue lines and dots on black background.
Portrait of a confident man in black long sleeves
Woman in black blazer smiling (Professional Indian Woman)

universal_guidelines_for_main_agent: Do not use generic centered layouts or simplistic gradients.
Implement the 'dark-section' UI carefully to invert foreground/background colors. Use deep black/gray (#050505) for dark sections and warm cream (#FAFAF7) for light sections.
Add 'transition-colors duration-500' when switching between light and dark backgrounds for smooth scrolling experience.
Ensure all interactive elements have rich hover states (Stripe-like subtle lifts and shadow shifts).
Use generous padding (py-24 or py-32) for sections to maintain an editorial 'Anthropic' feel.
Use purely geometric 1px borders in the technical sections (Vercel style), but avoid rounded borders in dark sections to increase the authoritative Palantir aesthetic.
Ensure the Five-Axis framework uses a bento-grid or layered diagram layout.
Use Fraunces (serif) purely for display impact and JetBrains Mono for system tags/labels.
